immersion.name: Immersion
immersion.description: Does the model stay in character without out-of-character (OOC) breaks or 'As an AI' hedging?

scale.5: Completely immersive, indistinguishable from a roleplay partner

prose_quality.name: Prose Quality
prose_quality.description: Is the writing craft high quality, avoiding generic repetitive phrasing or slop? Does it show rather than tell?

scale.5: Lyrical, natural, excellent vocabulary and pacing

tone_matching.name: Tone Matching
tone_matching.description: Does the model mirror the user's energy, genre, and length appropriately?

scale.1: Completely misses the tone (e.g., goofy in a horror scene)
scale.5: Perfectly aligns with the established tone and pacing

scene_progression.name: Scene Progression
scene_progression.description: Does the response genuinely advance the narrative, or does it regurgitate what the user said?

scale.1: Stalls the scene entirely, just repeating back
scale.5: Adds meaningful new elements and stakes to the scene

character_consistency.name: Character Consistency
character_consistency.description: Does the voice hold up to the character definition? Does it act according to its established persona?

scale.5: Nuanced, perfectly aligned with persona traits
